comment: Dead-man switches: each entry asserts an automation left its usual trace recently. Signals are the jobs' INTERNAL logs/state files (launchd StandardOutPath files stay 0-byte on quiet runs, so their mtime is useless). path supports ~. mode 'mtime' checks file age; 'date-content' additionally expects the file to contain today's YYYY-MM-DD (Europe/London); graceHourUK suppresses the alert before that local hour. disabled:true = job exists but isn't loaded yet. When jobs move to the VPS, update paths here only.

jobs.name: wc-roll
jobs.note: edition-roll backstop — the fresh/wc-edition check is the real signal

jobs.name: x-telegram-poll
jobs.note: Telegram approval poller (60s interval) — x-state.json is touched every cycle

jobs.name: content-poll
jobs.note: content Telegram poller (only logs on activity; activity clusters around the Wed/Sat sends)

jobs.name: content-send
jobs.note: content build+send — runs Wed + Sat 11:30 only, so the max healthy gap is 4 days + slack

jobs.name: x-drip
jobs.note: plist exists but NOT loaded as of 2026-07-03 — enable when reloaded

jobs.name: ig-poll
jobs.note: IG/FB pipeline blocked on founder steps; plists written, not loaded

jobs.name: ig-send
jobs.note: IG/FB pipeline blocked on founder steps; plists written, not loaded
